channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Why the ‘iPhone of smartwatches’ remains so elusive
item.description: Ever since it became obvious that the iPhone was one of the most transformative consumer products in history, a question has been floating out there: Would its impact ever be matched by a device in an even newer category? And if something pulled it off, what would it be? After a decade and a half—so
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: Google and OpenAI Struggle with Surging Demand for Generative AI
item.description: Generative AI models from Google and OpenAI put data centers under stress, prompting rate limits to prevent system overload.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Marvel sleuths think they've solved the case about Avengers: Doomsday's story, and it's all down to a single chair's shadow
item.description: Avengers 5's cast reveal livestream has spawned two new big Marvel fan theories about its plot and a popular character's return.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Hey listen! The live-action Legend of Zelda movie just got a 2027 release date confirmed by Sony and Nintendo
item.description: Sony and Nintendo set March 26, 2027 release date for the live-action film adaptation of The Legend of Zelda video game.
item.dc:creator: amelia.schwanke@futurenet.com (Amelia Schwanke), TechRadar

item.title: Airtel connects India with 100Tbps submarine cable
item.description: In a significant development for digital infrastructure in India, Bharti Airtel has landed the 2Africa Pearls submarine cable, delivering 100 Terabits per second of international network capacity for the country. The submarine cable will connect to Airtel’s cable landing station (CLS) in Mumbai.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Here's when Samsung's One UI 7 upgrade will finally roll out to your older Galaxy devices
item.description: We've got more details on when Samsung's take on Android 15 will reach the Galaxy S23 phones and other devices.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: ChatGPT 4o just got better, although I’m yet to notice a difference
item.description: OpenAI just updated ChatGPT 4o with more intuition and creativity, although I don't think most people will notice.
item.dc:creator: john-anthony.disotto@futurenet.com (John-Anthony Disotto), TechRadar

item.title: La Diputación de Girona optimiza el uso de sus recursos mediante la automatización
item.description: El Departamento de Intervención de la Diputación de Girona ha implementado de la mano de Atos un proyecto de automatización de procesos (RPA).
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The RACI matrix: Your blueprint for project success
item.description: Having managed and rescued dozens of projects, and helped others do so, I’ve noted that there is always one critical success factor (CSF) that has either been effectively addressed or missed/messed up: clarity around the roles and responsibilities for each project participant and key stakeholder.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: G2 Names INE 2025 Cybersecurity Training Leader
item.description: INE, a global leader in networking and cybersecurity training and certifications, is proud to announce it is the recipient of twelve badges in G2’s Spring 2025 Report, including Grid Leader for Cybersecurity Professional Development, Online Course Providers, and Technical Skills Development, which h
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: New Australia CIO appointments
item.description: Congratulations to these ‘movers and shakers’ recently hired or promoted into a new chief information officer, senior IT, or board role in Australia. February and March 2025 appointments John Granger joins Healthscope Healthscope has appointed John Granger as Chief Information Officer.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration's use of a popular messaging app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 3 keys to maximizing data strategies
item.description: Business leaders know it’s crucial to use identity-driven customer data to make smart decisions. But often, they get stuck because they don’t have a unified view of their customers and prospects. That’s a recipe for poor business outcomes.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: State Department announces approval of armed drones sale to Qatar for nearly $2 billion
item.description: The United States has given an initial approval for the energy-rich Mideast nation of Qatar to buy eight armed MQ-9B Predator drones for its military, an estimated purchase worth nearly $2 billion.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien And Sarah Parvini, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Los Angeles sheriff's department to retest 4,000 DNA samples after using faulty kits for 8 months
item.description: The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department says it will retest 4,000 DNA samples and open an internal investigation after learning that it used potentially flawed test kits for eight months.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Senate Republican: Taylor Swift could write song about 'terrible breakup' between Musk, liberals
item.description: Sen. Bernie Moreno (R-Ohio) joked Thursday about the “terrible breakup” between Elon Musk and liberals, as Democrats denounce the tech billionaire’s prominent role in the Trump administration. After Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Figure skating embraces the future with new technology, modern concepts to engage athletes and fans
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ashley Wagner and Ben Agosto know what it's like to step off the ice at the figure skating world championships and feel as though they've conquered the sport. And what it feels like when the notoriously fickle sport bites back.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Modern Military Healthcare: Digital and integrated
item.description: Integrating electronic health records, remote sensing, and artificial intelligence brings efficiency for both patients and providers. The post Modern Military Healthcare: Digital and integrated first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Data Center Backlash: OpenAI Contemplates Building Own Data Center Amid Microsoft's Pullback
item.description: OpenAI reportedly considers building its own data center, while Microsoft pulls back on infrastructure investments, raising concerns about market repositioning and potential oversupply of compute clusters.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Federal News Network’s CX Exchange 2025
item.description: End-to-End Experience – The evolution of federal service delivery The post Federal News Network’s CX Exchange 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: 5 big takeaways from Nvidia GTC
item.description: Now that the dust has settled from Nvidia’s GTC 2025, a few industry experts weighed in on some core big picture developments from the conference.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Radical new tech brings flying cars closer to reality
item.description: With six cyclorotors, the BlackBird from CycloTech is designed to take off and land vertically, move sideways, brake mid-air and even parallel park.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
